column4: Created refund ticket - Title: Refund Request - Cancelled Showing, Priority: High
Assigned to handle refund request. Booking verified and refund approved.
Refund processed to original payment method. Customer notified of 3-5 business day timeline.
Reviewed RF001. Refund case closed successfully. Positive handling noted.
Created refund ticket - Title: Duplicate Charge on Credit Card, Priority: Critical
Duplicate charge confirmed. Immediate refund initiated for TXN20260407005.
Refund fully processed. Payment team notified to investigate root cause.
RF002 escalated to IT. Payment gateway retry bug identified and patched.
Created refund ticket - Title: Broken Seat Refund Request, Priority: Medium
Full refund processed. Seat C12 flagged for urgent maintenance. Complimentary RM50 credit added to customer account.
Status updated to CLOSED. Customer confirmed satisfaction.
Created refund ticket - Title: Refund - Wrong Movie Booked, Priority: Medium
Refund initiated for Interstellar tickets. Avatar seats secured for same date at 8 PM.
Booking swap completed. New confirmation sent to customer. Ticket closed.
Created refund ticket - Title: Refund Request - Overcharged, Priority: Critical
Critical billing error confirmed. RM410 overcharge identified. Escalated to billing team as urgent.
Overcharge confirmed as pricing system error. Refund of RM410 approved. Finance team processing.
Created refund ticket - Title: Refund - Event Postponed, Priority: Medium
Postponement verified. Full refund processed as customer ineligible to attend July date.
Created refund ticket - Title: Refund for Wrong Seat Tier, Priority: High
Seat allocation error confirmed. Partial refund for price difference being processed. Premium seat reserved for next show.
Created refund ticket - Title: Refund for Wrong Movie, Priority: High
Created technical difficulty ticket - Title: Cannot Login to App, Priority: High, Device: Desktop Computer
Initial troubleshooting provided. Cache clear and browser change recommended.
Account manually reset from backend. Temporary password sent to customer email.
Customer confirmed successful login. Ticket closed.
Created technical difficulty ticket - Title: Payment Gateway Not Responding, Priority: Critical, Device: Mobile Phone
Android compatibility issue identified. Mobile browser workaround provided to customer.
Development team notified. Fix scheduled for deployment within 48 hours.
Status updated to CLOSED. Customer confirmed workaround is functional.
Created technical difficulty ticket - Title: Booking Confirmation Email Not Received, Priority: Medium, Device: Laptop
Booking confirmed in system. Email delivery failure identified. Confirmation email resent manually.
Created technical difficulty ticket - Title: App Crashes on Seat Selection, Priority: High, Device: Mobile Phone
Crash reproduced on Android 14 with Samsung Galaxy S23. Bug logged with engineering team.
Status updated to IN_PROGRESS. Customer notified that patch is in development.
Created technical difficulty ticket - Title: QR Code Not Scanning at Entrance, Priority: Critical, Device: Mobile Phone
Screenshot workaround provided to customer. Issue resolved on-site.
Created problem ticket - Title: Website Crashes on Checkout, Priority: Critical
Critical bug escalated to engineering. Memory overflow in checkout module identified. Fix ETA 2 hours.
Resolution steps provided: Engineering deployed hotfix for checkout memory overflow. Users advised to clear cache and retry.
Issue resolved and confirmed by customer. Ticket closed.
Created problem ticket - Title: Purchased Tickets Not in Account, Priority: High
Payment confirmed. Database sync issue identified. Manual sync forced for affected booking.
Resolution steps provided: Forced database sync. Customer advised to log out and back in to refresh account data.
Customer confirmed tickets are now visible. Ticket closed.
Created problem ticket - Title: Discount Code Not Applying, Priority: Medium
Bug identified - discount code field on cart page not functioning. Workaround provided via payment step entry.
Status updated to IN_PROGRESS. Bug report submitted to development team for fix.
Created problem ticket - Title: Search Filter Not Working, Priority: Low
Bug reproduced and confirmed across all browsers. Logged with development team.
PR004 bug confirmed. Engineering team assigned. ETA for fix is next sprint.
Created problem ticket - Title: Profile Picture Upload Failing, Priority: Low
JPG validation bug reproduced and confirmed. Flagged to engineering. Customer notified.
Created problem ticket - Title: Newsletter Unsubscribe Not Working, Priority: Low
Customer manually removed from all mailing lists. Unsubscribe endpoint bug submitted as bug report.
Resolution steps provided: User removed from mailing lists manually. Bug report submitted to fix unsubscribe endpoint for all users.
Status updated to IN_PROGRESS. Customer confirmed no more emails received.
Created problem ticket - Title: Double Booking on Same Date, Priority: High
Double booking confirmed - race condition during high-traffic period. Duplicate voided and refund initiated.
Resolution steps provided: Race condition identified in seat locking mechanism. Duplicate booking BKG-20260415-002 voided. Refund initiated. Valid booking confirmed.
Incident reviewed. Engineering team briefed on race condition. Ticket closed.
Created change request ticket - Title: Seat Change Request - Concert April 25, Priority: Medium
Seat availability checked. Orchestra Center Row A Seat 5 confirmed available.
Seat change completed from Row C Seat 12 to Orchestra Center A5. Updated ticket emailed to customer. Ticket closed.
Created change request ticket - Title: Reschedule Tickets to Evening Show, Priority: Low
Evening 7 PM slot confirmed available. No extra charge applied.
Tickets updated to 7 PM showing on April 16. New e-tickets sent. Ticket closed.
Created change request ticket - Title: Change Booking Date by One Week, Priority: Medium
April 27 seats confirmed available for same show. Booking date change initiated.
Created general ticket - Title: How to Share Tickets with Friends, Priority: Low
Ticket transfer instructions provided. Customer acknowledged.
Created general ticket - Title: Group Booking Discount Enquiry, Priority: Low
Group discount tiers explained. Customer connected with corporate events coordinator. Ticket closed.
Created general ticket - Title: Loyalty Points Balance Enquiry, Priority: Low
Missing points identified due to system migration gap Jan-Mar 2026. 480 points manually credited. Total balance corrected to 630 points.
Comment: No refund for u :D
Comment: :(
Ticket closed by customer (issue resolved).
Comment: The ticket will be closed then, thanks!
Status changed from OPEN to CLOSED
Comment: Ticket status changed to: CLOSED
Assigned to tommypark: why not
Comment: Nice
